common.description: Address of worker and the value cannot be empty. Multiple nodes can be configured, such as ("127.0.0.1:18482" "127.0.0.2:18482").
Address of master and the value cannot be empty.
Upper limit of the shared memory, the unit is mb, must be greater than 0.
Upper limit of the shared memory in percentage can be used by OC, must be within (0, 100]
Disk cache data placement directory, default value is empty, indicating that disk cache is not enabled.
The total size of disk cache data, the unit is MB.
The number of disk cache Arena.
Time interval between worker and etcd heartbeats.
Indicates whether to enable the tenant authentication, default is false.

Using shared memory to exchange data between client and worker. if this parameter is set to be true, client and worker will pass control messages through uds; Otherwise, they pass control messages through tcp/ip, and exchange data through tcp/ip.
The directory to store unix domain socket file. The UDS generates temporary files in this path. Max lenth: 80
Prefix of all tables in etcd, which is used to distinguish tables created by different data systems in etcd.
Specify other az names using the same etcd. Split by ','
Control whether data read and write from the L2 cache daemon depend on metadata. Note: If set to false, it indicates that the metadata is not stored in etcd.
Whether to support distributed master, default is true.
A direct tcp/ip port for worker to workers scenarios to improve latency. Acceptable values:0, or some positive integer. 0 means disabled.
Number of parallel connections between worker/worker oc service. Flag oc_worker_worker_direct_port must be enabled to take effect.
minimum payload size to trigger no memory copy
The number of worker service for object cache.
Thread number of eviction for object cache.
The reserved memory (MB) is determined by min(shared_memory_size_mb*0.2, eviction_reserve_mem_threshold_mb). Eviction begins when memory drops below this threshold.The valid range is 100-102400.
Client reconnect wait seconds, default is 5.
ETCD metadata async pool size.
The path and file name prefix of the spilling, empty means spill disabled.
Maximum amount of spilled data that can be stored in the spill directory. If spill is enable and spill_size_limit is 0, spill_size_limit will be set to 95% of the spill directory.
It represents the maximum parallelism of writing files, more threads will consume more CPU and I/O resources.

The size limit of single spill file, spilling objects which lager than that value with one object per file. If there are some big objects, you can increase this value to avoid run out of inodes quickly. The valid range is 200-10240.

The maximum number of open file descriptors about spill. If opened file exceed this value, some files will be temporarily closed to prevent exceeding the maximum system limit. You need reduce this value if your system resources are limited. The valid range is greater than or equal to 8.
Disable readahead can mitigate the read amplification problem for offset read, default is true
Record performance and resource logs.
Specify the type of exporter, either harddisk or backend. Only takes effect when log_monitor is true.
The sleep time between iterations of observability collector scan.
Log messages below this level will not actually be recorded anywhere.
The access key for system component AK/SK authentication.
The secret key for system component AK/SK authentication.
The data key for system to decrypt sensitive data. The length of encrypted datakey should be 32
The access key for tenant AK/SK authentication.
The secret key for tenant AK/SK authentication.
When AK/SK authentication is used, if the duration from the client to the server is longer than this parameter, the authentication fails and the service is denied.
Maximum number of clients that can be connected to a worker. Value range: [1, 10000].
Config the l2 cache type, obs. Optional value: 'obs', 'none'
Deprecated: This flag is deprecated and will be removed in future releases.

Config MASTER back store directory and must specify in rocksdb scenario. The rocksdb database is used to persistently store the metadata stored in the master so that the metadata before the restart can be re-obtained when the master restarts.
Controls whether rocksdb sets sync to true when writing data.
Number of open files that can be used by the rocksdb
Number of background threads rocksdb can use for flushing and compacting.
Maximum time interval before a node is considered lost.
Maximum time interval for the etcd to determine node death.
The arena count for each tenant. Multiple arenas can improve the performance of share memory allocation for the first time, but each arena will use one more fd.
The memory reclamation time after free.
Time to wait for the first node that wants to join a working hash ring.
Decide whether to remove the node from hash ring or not when node is dead
Whether to support self-healing when the hash ring is in an abnormal state, default is false.
Maximum time interval for the worker to determine client death, Value range: [15, UINT64_MAX).

Configure the path of the worker monitoring configuration file. During the execution of the worker, it periodically monitors whether the configuration file is changed to update the flag parameter value.

The log level can be configured to take effect only for specified workers, such as (-loglevel_only_for_workers=192.168.0.1,192.168.0.2). If this parameter is left blank, the parameter takes effect for all workers.

Control this process by enabling transparent huge pages, default is disabled. Enable Transparent Huge Pages (THP) can enhance performance and reduce page table overhead, but it may also lead to increased memory usage
Control whether try to get data from other AZ's worker firstly, if false then get data from L2 cache directly.
Control whether get meta data from other AZ's worker, if false then get meta data from local AZ.
Whether to enable reconciliation, default is true.
The worker ensures a certain period of time that the asynchronous queues for sending messages to ETCD and L2 cache remain empty before it can exit properly.
Pass in access key for authentication when connecting to OBS.
Pass in secret key for authentication when connecting to OBS.
OBS address.
Name of OBS bucket to use. Can use only one bucket
Whether to enable the https in obs. false: use HTTP (default), true: use HTTPS
The path to the mounted SFS.
File will create after the worker successfully.
Config rpc server thread number, must be great equal than 0.
The directory where log files are stored.
Prefix of log filename, default is program invocation short name. Use standard characters only.
Size of async logger's message queue.
Maximum log file size (in MB), must be greater than 0.
Maximum number of log files to retain per severity level. And every log file size is limited by max_log_size.

If log_retention_day is greater than 0, any log file from your project whose last modified time is greater than log_retention_day days will be unlinked. If log_retention_day is equal 0, will not unlink log file by time.
Flush log files with async mode.
Buffer log messages for at most this many seconds.
Compress old log files in .gz format. This parameter takes effect only when the size of the generated log is greater than max log size.
vlog level.
Whether to enable the authentication function between components(worker, master).
Optimize the performance of the customer. Default server 5. The higher the throughput, the higher the value, but should be in range [1, 32].
Optimize the performance of a client stub. Default value 5. The higher the throughput, the higher the value, but should be in range [1, 32].
Parallel payload split chunk size. Default to 1048756 bytes.
The directory to find ZMQ curve key files. This path must be specified when zmq authentication is enabled.
choose the type of encrypt. Support plaintext, default is plaintext.
Whether to enable ETCD auth, default is false. ETCD certificate will be obtained by sts. If you want to enable etcd auth, configure encrypt_kit is sts at the same time.
Set etcd target name override for SSL host name checking, default is none. The configuration value should be consistent with the DNS content of the Subject Alternate Names of the TLS certificate.
The path of encrypted root etcd certificate, default is none.
The path of encrypted client's etcd certificate chain, default is none.
The path of encrypted client's etcd private key, default is none.
The path of passphrase for the encrypted etcd encypted private key, default is none.
Option to switch between RPC (ZMQ) and RDMA for data transfer, default false to run with RPC.
Number of complete record to poll at a time, 16 is the max this device can poll
Register the whole arena as segment during init, otherwise, register each object as a segment.
Number of jfs and jfr pair
Uses interrupt mode to poll completion events.
Enable worker->worker OC batch get, default false.
The payload threshold to batch get objects, the unit is mb, must be greater than 0. Setting to 0 will indicate no split.
Maximum number of sessions that can be cached, must be within [512, 10'000]
Option to turn on data verification to verify data from a producer is received in order.
This is controlled by the flag of mmap(MAP_HUGETLB) which can improve memory access and reducing the overhead of page table, default is disable.
Due to k8s's resource calculation policies,shared memory is sometimes multiple counted , which can lead to client crashes, Using fallocate to address this issue.
The data threshold to transfer obj data between client and worker via shm, unit is KB.
Migrate data to another node before the node exits if other nodes are available. If this is the only node in the cluster, exits directly and the data will be lost.
Maximum duration of the rolling upgrade, default value is 1800 seconds.
Heterogeneous object transfer protocol Enables p2ptransfer.
